Localization.Description: The MultiDump utility was used to dump SAM, SECURITY, and SYSTEM hives without triggering Defender alerts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} locally saved the contents of the SAM, SECURITY, and SYSTEM registry hives to files {datafield16} using utility {object.process.parent.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} saved the contents of the SAM, SECURITY, and SYSTEM registry hives using utility {object.process.parent.name} on host {event_src.host} and then sent it to remote host {dst.ip}:{dst.port}
